---
title: "About Me"
output: postcards::jolla
---

<div style="padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; margin-bottom: 25px; font-size: 16px;">
  <a href="index.html" style="margin-right: 20px;">Home</a>
  <a href="showcase.html" style="margin-right: 20px;">Showcase</a>
  <a href="postcard.html">About Me</a>
</div>

Hi, I’m Adam, a Malaysian student studying Politics and International Relations at the University of Essex. I’m interested in politics, data analysis, and global affairs, but I also enjoy learning about history, cultures, and how the world works more broadly. Outside university, I keep active through gym training, bouldering, and swimming, and I enjoy reading in my free time. In the future, I hope to work in consulting or policy where I can apply analytical thinking to real-world challenges.

 View my GV300 analysis here:  
[Go to Showcase](showcase.html)
